transcript: I'm starving, you want to go to McDonald's? Yeah man, I'll just get two McDoubles, no cheese, no sauce. We'll go ahead and get apple slices and Diet Coke. Okay, but what if we went to Wendy's instead? Yeah man, Wendy's I'll go ahead and get the chicken wrap and then we'll get a side salad with light dressing and a Diet Coke. Actually, I'm kind of craving Taco Bell. Taco Bell, let's go ahead and do the Power Bowl with the chicken, no rice, no sour cream. Extra Chicken, Baja Blast Zero. And how do you always know what to order at every restaurant? The MenuFit app is gonna give you the best order at every restaurant to hit your fitness goals. Hey, I'm gonna download the MenuFit app right now.
caption:
Comment "FASTFOOD" for my FREE fast food swap cheat sheet

Steal these 3 Fast Food Swaps

McDonald's
Two McDoubles no cheese no sauce + apple slices + Diet Coke
(540 calories 48 G protein)

Wendy's
Chicken wrap + side salad + light dressing + Diet Coke
(430 calories 38 G protein)

Taco Bell
Power bowl double chicken - no rice no sour cream + Baja Blast Zero
(760 calories 52 G protein)
